text.title: Trunk-Based Challenges & Diagnostics Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml for trunk-based-challenges.

conclusion.verdict: no diagnostic needed; document baseline and re-measure quarterly

branch.question: Branch protection includes all CI jobs?

conclusion.verdict: FIX: complete branch protection required-status list
FIX: cap PR diff at 200 lines + 4h review SLA
FIX: walk full checklist; almost certainly CI speed or branch protection

text.example: freq=1_to_3_per_week → branch_protection_complete=true → FIX: PR-size cap 200 + review SLA 4h. Rule: pr-size-cap-200.
